facts.statement: Brazil won the 2002 FIFA World Cup.
Germany finished runner-up at the 2002 FIFA World Cup.
Turkey finished third at the 2002 FIFA World Cup.

sources.name: OpenFootball World Cup 2002 group-stage data
sources.notes: Used for group-stage match-level fixtures/results. Attendance is not provided by this source.

sources.name: OpenFootball World Cup 2002 knockout/finals data
sources.notes: Used for knockout, third-place, and final match-level fixtures/results. Attendance is not provided by this source.

sources.sourceName: FIFA World Cup awards / 2002 tournament awards summary
sources.notes: Use as a fallback/free awards source. Prefer FIFA official archive if available.

skippedStats.reason: Top-level goals array is empty because scorer events were not normalized and source-backed at match-event level.
Top-level cards array is empty because card events were not loaded from a verified match-event source.
Attendance was not present in the loaded match source; matches store attendance:null with data quality notes.
Awards were not loaded into this generated dataset because this run only used the match schedule/result feed as the normalized source.

dataQualityNotes: Match results are the source of truth for group standings.
Group standings, points, goal difference, and qualification fields are computed from group-stage matches.
Attendance is null unless verified in the loaded match-level source.
Goals and cards arrays are intentionally empty; do not compute player scoring or disciplinary stats from this file until verified event-level data is loaded.

warnings.message: 64 matches have attendance:null because attendance was not present in the loaded match source.
Goal scorer events were not normalized into top-level goals; player scoring stats should not be computed.
Card events were not loaded; card stats should not be computed.
Players were not loaded; player and goalkeeper stats should not be computed.
Awards were not loaded; award cards should not be displayed.

safeToUseFor: group standings computed from match scores
headline tournament award cards from fallback public awards summary
team aggregate stats from match scores
tournament aggregate stats from match scores
notSafeToUseFor: first-time historical milestone cards unless facts are loaded
goal minutes until OpenFootball ingestion is run
goal scorers until OpenFootball ingestion is run

warnings.message: 64 matches have attendance:null because attendance was not present in the loaded match source.
Goal scorer events were not normalized into top-level goals; player scoring stats should not be computed.
Card events were not loaded; card stats should not be computed.
Players were not loaded; player and goalkeeper stats should not be computed.
Awards were not loaded; award cards should not be displayed.
Top-level goals array is empty; do not compute scorers, Golden Boot, fastest goal, hat-tricks, assists, or player goal trends from this file.
Top-level cards array is empty; do not compute yellow/red card stats or fair-play tie-breakers from this file.

dataCoverageNotes: This v3 file is schema-ready for event-level stats.
Goals and goal minutes are available from OpenFootball source targets but are not ingested in this bundle because the runtime could not bulk-fetch source files.
Cards, assists, saves, and Player of the Match remain missing unless a verified source is ingested.
Tournament awards are populated for completed tournaments from public awards summaries; prefer FIFA official archive as a stronger source if available.
